session_lessons.lesson: Two-step refactor when the natural first step temporarily breaks the tree: 260719-e5g's T-1 (git mv views into views/) left main.py's bare imports broken until T-2 rewrote them, and 260719-f0b's T-1 (remove weather_view.refresh) left main.py's call sites broken until T-2 added _refresh_all. Handled cleanly by landing T-1+T-2 as a single atomic commit in the second refactor, and by explicit ordering notes in the plan for the first. General pattern worth remembering: if step A leaves the tree broken without step B, either commit them together OR add a plan note that verify-block ast.parse will fail on A alone.
session_lessons.evidence: .planning/quick/260719-e5g-*/PLAN.md and 260719-f0b-*/PLAN.md both flag this in task ordering notes.

session_lessons.lesson: Composition-root fan-out (main.py owns cross-view dispatch, views are leaves) is the clean version of the D-31/D-38/D-41 'cache-status inline read + main.py-gated render' template. Now that views don't import each other, adding a new view to the carousel means: (a) drop views/<new>_view.py with render+setters+predicates, (b) add its import to main.py, (c) add its setter call to _refresh_all if it needs bootstrap-derived state, (d) extend the VIEWS tuple. No churn in existing views.
session_lessons.evidence: Confirmed by the 260719-f0b refactor + the refreshed .planning/codebase/ARCHITECTURE.md.

session_lessons.lesson: gsd-sdk binary is NOT installed on this host (`command -v gsd-sdk` returns nothing). The workflows fall back to the legacy `~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs` invoked via node. Every quick task this session went through that legacy tool (init quick, current-timestamp). Non-blocking but worth flagging — if a future workflow hard-requires gsd-sdk (some newer commands like `gsd-sdk query commit` fall back to `gsd-tools.cjs commit`, others don't), install gsd-sdk (`npm install -g get-shit-done-cc`) or the workflow will exit at Step 2.
session_lessons.evidence: Every quick-task init in this session used `node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs init quick` instead of `gsd-sdk query init.quick`.

notable_deviations.topic: Executor for 260719-f0b did partial STATE.md update in commit 1b47637
notable_deviations.captured_in_plan: Plan constrained executor to NOT commit STATE.md or SUMMARY.md — orchestrator handles the final docs commit in workflow Step 8.
notable_deviations.actual: Executor included STATE.md in its T-3 docs commit (1b47637) along with CLAUDE.md, but the row commit-hash column was left as `—`. Orchestrator's Step 8 commit (a4ec428) filled in the hash + refreshed session continuity + added PLAN.md and SUMMARY.md.
notable_deviations.impact: No data loss; STATE.md ended in the correct final shape. The doubled STATE.md touch is cosmetic. Consider tightening the executor's boundary check in a future GSD update if this becomes a pattern.

next_action: Run /gsd:new-milestone to scope v1.1 or v2. Alternative: /gsd:resume-work to reload state summary and reconfirm before acting. On-device flash of the refactored tree is non-blocking but recommended before v2 scoping so any hidden regression is caught before it's built on top of.
